subcodes.first_line: Verily, My heart hath moved Me to make mention of the two hearts and to turn towards the two Qiblihs, though upon them both be glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان قلبی اقامنی علی ذکر القلبین و التوجه الی القبلتین ولو انهما علیهما بهاء
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
